Arrival & Basic Politeness.jp: ありがとうございます
日本語があまり話せません
Arrival & Basic Politeness.en: I don't speak much Japanese (nihongo ga amari hanasemasen)

Transport & Directions.en: where is the station? (eki wa doko desu ka)

Transport & Directions.jp: この電車は東京に行きますか？
Transport & Directions.en: does this train go to Tokyo? (kono densha wa Tokyo ni ikimasu ka)
one ticket, please (kippu o ichimai kudasai)
which platform is it? (nanbansen desu ka)
I'll get off at the next stop (tsugi de orimasu)
does it stop here? (koko de tomarimasu ka)

Transport & Directions.jp: タクシー乗り場はどこですか？
Transport & Directions.en: where is the taxi stand? (takushii noriba wa doko desu ka)

Transport & Directions.jp: 空港までお願いします
Transport & Directions.en: to the airport, please (kuukou made onegaishimasu)

Transport & Directions.jp: 右に曲がってください
Transport & Directions.en: please turn right (migi ni magatte kudasai)

Transport & Directions.jp: まっすぐ行ってください

Hotel & Check-In.jp: チェックインをしたいです
Hotel & Check-In.en: I'd like to check in (chekkuin o shitai desu)
is breakfast included? (choushoku wa arimasu ka)
is there Wi-Fi? (wai-fai wa arimasu ka)
I lost the key (kagi o nakushimashita)

Hotel & Check-In.jp: チェックアウトは何時ですか？
Hotel & Check-In.en: what time is check-out? (chekkuauto wa nanji desu ka)
I'd like to leave my luggage (nimotsu o azuketai desu)

Hotel & Check-In.jp: もう一枚タオルをください
Hotel & Check-In.en: one more towel, please (mou ichimai taoru o kudasai)

Food & Restaurants.en: what do you recommend? (osusume wa nan desu ka)
what is this? (kore wa nan desu ka)
I don't eat meat (niku wa tabemasen)

Food & Restaurants.jp: 辛くしないでください
Food & Restaurants.en: please don't make it spicy (karaku shinaide kudasai)
can I take it to go? (mochikaeri dekimasu ka)

Shopping, Help & Emergencies.en: how much is it? (ikura desu ka)
can I pay by card? (kaado wa tsukaemasu ka)

Shopping, Help & Emergencies.jp: もう少し安くなりますか？
Shopping, Help & Emergencies.en: can it be a little cheaper? (mou sukoshi yasuku narimasu ka)
I'll take this one (kore o kudasai)
I don't need a bag (fukuro wa irimasen)
where is the toilet? (toire wa doko desu ka)

Shopping, Help & Emergencies.jp: 警察を呼んでください
Shopping, Help & Emergencies.en: please call the police (keisatsu o yonde kudasai)
where is the hospital? (byouin wa doko desu ka)
